title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 21.200 - Expenses of visiting committees
text:
21.200.  Expenses of visiting committees. — No member of any committee shall be allowed any pay by the committee on accounts or by resolution for visiting any institution or place, except actual necessary expenses incurred in the discharge of his duties on the committee, which amount shall be certified by the chairman of the visiting committee before allowance.
(RSMo 1939 § 12869, A.L. 1957 p. 595) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11244; 1919 § 7119; 1909 § 8118
